name: Steve Irwin
title: Steve Irwin taken 9/4/2006 died later that day on 9/4/2006, 44
description: Steve Irwin taken 9/4/2006 died later that day on 9/4/2006, 44
bio: Steve Irwin, known as "The Crocodile Hunter", was an Australian wildlife expert and television personality. His infectious enthusiasm for wildlife conservation made him one of the most beloved nature presenters in history.
